name: Apricot Chicken Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts.
2. Place the chicken in an oven-safe pan large enough that it won't overlap.
3. Combine the apricot nectar, ground allspice, ground ginger, black pepper, salt, apricot preserves, and toasted pecans to form a marinade.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken and turn the pieces to coat evenly. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight.
5. Remove the chicken from the refrigerator and let it stand for 30 minutes before cooking.
6. Cover the pan tightly with foil and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
7. Uncover the pan, discard any liquid, and keep the chicken warm.
8. Brush the remaining apricot preserves over the chicken.
9. Continue baking uncovered for an additional 20-30 minutes, basting with preserves twice more.
10. Transfer to a serving platter and sprinkle with toasted pecans.
11. Serve over rice.
